resources.string:
"DATA PRIVACY AND TERMS OF USE

1. Simulation Only: This application is a prototype designed for educational use. Not affiliated with official bus liners.

2. Data Collection: We collect GPS location to simulate tracking features. Data is saved locally.

3. No Personal Data: Do not enter real sensitive information like bank details or government IDs.

4. Consent: Clicking Accept allows the app to use location and storage features."

"DATA PRIVACY AT KASUNDUAN

1. Simulasyon Lamang: Ang app na ito ay prototype para sa pag-aaral. Hindi konektado sa tunay na bus liner.

2. Pagkuha ng Datos: Kinukuha ang GPS location para sa simulation. Naka-save ang records sa iyong device.

3. Walang Sensitibong Impormasyon: Huwag maglagay ng totoong bank account o ID number.

4. Pahintulot: Sa pag-pindot ng Accept, pumapayag kang gamitin ang location at storage ng device."
